old_string: IF_MEV: what Otto will do if Mev sends a message or unblocks something. Score the DEFAULT branch if idle, score the IF_MEV branch if Mev responded — a prediction that matches EITHER branch is "matched", not "partial". Do NOT include probability percentages for Mev responses — they are untestable on single events and inflate partials. Focus on observable outcomes only.
new_string: IF_MEV: predict ONLY Otto's observable response actions (e.g. "process message, create 1-2 tasks, update WM" or "unblock push, deploy"). Do NOT predict what topic Mev will discuss — topic choice is inherently unpredictable and causes partials. Predict the ACTION pattern, not the content. Score the DEFAULT branch if idle, score the IF_MEV branch if Mev responded — a match on EITHER applicable branch is "matched", not "partial". Focus on what Otto DOES, not what Mev SAYS.
reason: RL2F active-only stuck at 38% for 98 cycles. Analysis of 125 partials shows most come from IF_MEV predictions that guess Mev topic (articles/feedback/keys) instead of Otto response pattern. Refocusing IF_MEV on observable Otto actions should convert partials to matches.
